testcase.name: test_auth_me_with_token
testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration7_features.py:54: in test_auth_me_with_token assert response.status_code == 200, f"auth/me failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: auth/me failed: {"detail":"Invalid token"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
